display.purpose: Newsreader serif. Page H1s, hero headlines, article titles.

title.purpose: Newsreader serif. Card titles, section headings, editor H2s.

body.purpose: Albert Sans. UI, navigation, forms, running copy (cap 65–75ch).

label.purpose: IBM Plex Mono. Statuses, keyword pills, eyebrows, metadata.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting shadow for cards, raised panels, dropdowns.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Hover lift, sticky top nav, featured pricing, AI command menu.

motion.name: page-enter
motion.purpose: 0.6s rise+fade for page regions; exponential ease-out.

motion.name: stagger-step
motion.purpose: Per-item delay increment for sequenced reveals (stagger-1…7).

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for interactive state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default action: ink fill, white text. Used for the main commit on a view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--color-ink, #0E1320); color: #fff; font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(14,19,32,0.06); transition: background 200ms, transform 200ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-ink-soft, #2A3F5F); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FAF7F2, 0 0 0 4px var(--color-ink-soft, #2A3F5F); }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: The editor's red pencil — terracotta fill for the single most important action on a view.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--color-accent, #C24E2E); color: #fff; font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(14,19,32,0.06); transition: background 200ms, transform 200ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #B0461F; } .ds-btn-accent:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FAF7F2, 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #C24E2E); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action: white fill, warm border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #D9D0C4); border-radius: 6px; background: #fff; color: var(--color-text-primary, #0E1320); font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(14,19,32,0.06); transition: background 200ms, border-color 200ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: rgba(14,19,32,0.2); background: var(--color-surface-raised, #F2EDE4); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FAF7F2, 0 0 0 4px var(--color-ink-soft, #2A3F5F); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Lifted white surface above the cream page; resting shadow, warm hairline border.
components.html:
Q3 content plan

14 articles in flight across 3 clients.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #D9D0C4); border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(14,19,32,0.04), 0 4px 16px rgba(14,19,32,0.06); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 6px; font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--color-text-primary, #0E1320); } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0; font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--color-text-muted, #6B6560); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: White-fill field with warm border and a 2px ink-soft focus ring (no glow).
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 40px; width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #D9D0C4); border-radius: 6px; background: #fff; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-text-primary, #0E1320); transition: border-color 200ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-muted, #6B6560); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #FAF7F2, 0 0 0 3px var(--color-ink-soft, #2A3F5F); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Full-pill pipeline status with a leading colored dot; status by label + dot, never color alone. Shown here in the Review (terracotta) state.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(194,78,46,0.25); background: rgba(194,78,46,0.1); padding: 2px 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-accent, #C24E2E); } .ds-status-dot { height: 6px; width: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--color-accent, #C24E2E); }

components.name: Metadata Badge
components.description: Mono uppercase tag for metadata and keyword pills.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #D9D0C4); background: var(--color-surface-raised, #F2EDE4); padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--color-text-muted, #6B6560); }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky ink-backed top bar with light links; active link is solid white on a translucent chip.
components.html:
Lede
PipelineCalendarAnalytics
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 40px; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: var(--color-ink, #0E1320); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(14,19,32,0.1), 0 2px 8px rgba(14,19,32,0.04); } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Albert Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); transition: all 200ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

narrative.overview: Lede looks like the working surface of a serious publication: warm paper underfoot, deep ink set in type, and a single red editor's pencil that marks only what matters. It is 'Notion meets The Economist' — the calm authority of a print masthead carried into a multi-tenant SaaS workspace. The interface reads as a publication, not a control panel: hierarchy and typography do the work that chrome and color do in lesser dashboards. The system is built on a near-black ink (#0E1320) as its primary, a warm cream paper (#FAF7F2) as its ground, and a terracotta accent (#C24E2E) used with deliberate rarity — the editor's red pencil. Serif display type (Newsreader) gives headings the gravity of a printed page; a humanist sans (Albert Sans) keeps the working UI quiet and legible; a mono (IBM Plex Mono) handles labels, badges, and metadata like a galley slug. Surfaces are flat at rest, lifting only on interaction. This system explicitly rejects sterile corporate-blue B2B SaaS, single-user 'AI magic' toy energy, and the generic dark-sidebar-plus-white-content app shell.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial calm: typography and hierarchy carry attention, not chrome.
Ink-on-paper foundation with a single, rare terracotta accent.
Serif display + humanist sans + mono metadata — three voices, clear jobs.
Flat by default; elevation is a response to state.
Restrained corners (4–6px) and quiet borders, never glassy or over-rounded.

rules.name: The Red Pencil Rule
rules.body: Terracotta (#C24E2E) is the editor's mark, not decoration. Keep it to ≤10% of any screen. If two terracotta elements compete for the eye on the same view, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Lifted-White Rule
rules.body: Cards and inputs are #FFFFFF; the page is cream (#FAF7F2). White is how a surface signals it sits above the paper. Never paint a card the same color as the page.

rules.name: The Serif-Heading Rule
rules.body: All h1–h3 render in Newsreader via .font-display. Never set a heading in Albert Sans.

rules.name: The Mono-Metadata Rule
rules.body: Mono is for machine facts — statuses, keywords, counts, slugs. Never set running prose or buttons in IBM Plex Mono.

rules.name: The Ink-Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow uses the ink hue (rgba(14,19,32,…)), never pure black.

dos: Do keep terracotta (#C24E2E) to ≤10% of any screen — it's the editor's red pencil.
Do set cards and inputs in white (#FFFFFF) above the cream page so they read as lifted.
Do set every h1–h3 in Newsreader serif via .font-display.
Do reserve IBM Plex Mono for statuses, keywords, counts, and metadata only.
Do tint all shadows with the ink hue (rgba(14,19,32,…)), never pure black.
Do convey article status with label + dot together, for WCAG 2.1 AA and color-blind users.
Do keep corners restrained (4–6px on cards/inputs; full-pill only on status badges).
Do provide a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for page-enter and stagger animations.
donts: Don't drift toward sterile corporate-blue B2B SaaS; the identity is warm ink-on-paper, not enterprise navy/cyan.
Don't add single-user 'AI magic' toy energy — no glowing gradients, neon accents, glassmorphism, or emoji marketing.
Don't use the generic dark-sidebar + white-content app shell; the app is top-nav-led, with a left panel only on editor/review pages.
Don't write hype-y growth-hacker copy ('10x your content!'); claims are specific and earned.
Don't set headings in Albert Sans or body/buttons in IBM Plex Mono.
Don't paint a card the same cream as the page, or use a pure-black shadow.
Don't over-round (no 24px+ radii on cards) or pair a 1px border with a wide soft drop shadow as decoration.
Don't add gradient text or colored side-stripe borders.
